title: Demonstrations
content:
Demonstrations # Wigner Semi-circle Law # A combinatorial proof and simulations of Wigner’s semicircle law, presented by Andjela Todorovic and me.
An animation of our simulation, shows the convergence of the empirical spectral distribution of a random matrix.
